name: imessage-text-blast
description: Send personalized iMessages to groups of contacts on a schedule

scripts.compile-swift: mkdir -p resources && SDK=$(xcrun --sdk macosx --show-sdk-path) && swiftc -target arm64-apple-macos11.0 -sdk "$SDK" src/swift/contacts_sync.swift -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker src/swift/Info.plist -o resources/contacts_sync_arm64 && swiftc -target x86_64-apple-macos11.0 -sdk "$SDK" src/swift/contacts_sync.swift -Xlinker -sectcreate -Xlinker __TEXT -Xlinker __info_plist -Xlinker src/swift/Info.plist -o resources/contacts_sync_x86_64 && lipo -create resources/contacts_sync_arm64 resources/contacts_sync_x86_64 -output resources/contacts_sync && rm resources/contacts_sync_arm64 resources/contacts_sync_x86_64
scripts.build: npm run compile-swift && vite build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 && CXXFLAGS='-std=c++20' electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3

extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: iMessage Text Blast needs access to your Contacts to import recipients and personalize messages.
